added.title: Reviewer scope note added
added.summary: The candidate adds a generic note that the fixture is for comparison behavior, not domain interpretation.
added.recommendation: Keep interpretation, thresholds, and follow-up ownership outside the shared package.

removed.title: Obsolete caveat remains
removed.summary: The baseline still includes a caveat for a generic source that is no longer part of the sanitized packet.
removed.recommendation: Remove stale caveats when their supporting synthetic evidence labels disappear.

before.title: Claim support is incomplete
before.summary: The synthetic claim relies on a generic evidence packet but does not yet name the supporting sanitized label.
before.recommendation: Add a sanitized evidence label before treating the claim as ready for caller-owned routing.

after.title: Claim support is incomplete
after.summary: The synthetic claim now names the sanitized evidence label but still needs one caller-owned confirmation before routing.
after.recommendation: Confirm the sanitized evidence label in the embedding repo before any caller-owned routing.

before.title: Action boundary is explicit
before.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
before.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.

after.title: Action boundary is explicit
after.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
after.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.
